questions.question: Which restaurants in Dallas Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Dallas Tx with weekend hours include: Domino's Pizza (Sat: 10:30-01:00), Ann's Snack Bar (Sat: 08:30-18:30), McDonald's (Sat: 06:00-23:00), Sonic (Sat: 07:00-24:00), Burger King (Sat: 06:00-21:59), Mason's Chicken & Seafood Grill (Sat: 11:00-22:00), Taco Bell (Sat: 08:00-02:00), Papa John's (Sat: 10:00-24:00) and 1183 more. 1191 total with weekend availability.
